projects.name: ClaudioOS
projects.handoff_excerpt: RTL8168 wired-ethernet driver runs on real HW. Link up at 1000M, TX works, RX blocked. DHCP times out because chip fires zero RX interrupts. Next: chip-variant-specific init (Linux r8169-style CPlusCmd + Config regs).
milestones_hit: Ethernet link up at 1000M on real hardware
blockers: RTL8168 RX path delivers zero frames — chip-variant-specific init needed

projects.name: The Right Wire

projects.name: PerformanceTracker
projects.handoff_excerpt: App running on iPhone 17 Pro Max + 8.5 yrs HealthKit history bundled (2,498,115 records, daily/weekly/monthly JSON rollups). Revenue tab pulls bank-feed transactions across All Orgs with 7/30/90/365d picker. Meal recommender has 32 templates incl. carb-tolerant post-strength refeeds.

Revenue tab Abacus bank-feed integration shipped
32 meal templates with post-strength refeed gating
